0000/00009254:
import cadquery as cq

height = 60.0
width = 80.0
thickness = 10.0
diameter = 22.0
padding = 12.0

result = (
    cq.Workplane("XY")
    .box(height, width, thickness)
    .faces(">Z")
    .workplane()
    .hole(diameter)
    .faces(">Z")
    .workplane()
    .rect(height - padding, width - padding, forConstruction=True)
    .vertices()
    .cboreHole(2.4, 4.4, 2.1)
)
